content:
# Session 12 (iter-012) ‚Äî review of `SectionGradedRing.lean` fine-grained pass

## Metadata
- Mode: fine-grained. Live scope: the ‚àÄL assoc chain B2‚ÜíB7 (comm chain deferred FUTURE).
- SNAP sorry count: **5 ‚Üí 6** (decomposition, NOT regression ‚Äî see below).
- Total open: 6 SNAP + 4 œá (QuotScheme, deferred) = 10.
- Build GREEN (`lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` ‚Üí 2439 jobs, no errors).
- Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents` untouched, still DELIVERED.
- `sync_leanok` iter 12, sha `71dd666`, +7 / -0, chapter `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`. Correct.

## The 5‚Üí6 is decomposition, verified
The prior single OPAQUE sorry `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (B5) is GONE ‚Äî B5 now has a complete
proof body. In its place the chain exposes two precise NAMED atoms with exact, typechecking statements:
B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (the genuine deep crux) and B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (canonical pentagon).
Net live-assoc sorries: B4 (crux), B6 (pentagon), B7 (needs Œº-slide + B4 + B6).

## Targets

### B2 `sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit` (L2392) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
- Proof: `rfl`. Element form driven through enclosing `.hom` application (never bare `‚äó‚Çú[forget‚ÇÇ]`).
- Closes because `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.whiskerRight_app` (`@[simp] rfl`) + ModuleCat
  `whiskerRight_apply` (`rfl`) + `sectionsMul = Œ∑.app (op ‚ä§)` (def `rfl`) compose definitionally.
- **lean_verify confirmed:** `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` ‚Äî no `sorryAx`.

### B3 `sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit` (L2417) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
- Left-whiskered analogue of B2 (`whiskerLeft_app` + `whiskerLeft_apply`), input `a‚äó‚Çú(b‚äó‚Çúc)`. `rfl`.
- **lean_verify confirmed:** axiom-clean.

### B5 `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (L2484) ‚Äî ASSEMBLED (own body sorry-free)
- Proof: `rw [‚Üê B2, ‚Üê B3]` ‚Üí `congrArg (œÜ ‚Ü¶ (œÜ.app ‚ä§).hom ((a‚äób)‚äóc)) (tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor ‚Ä¶)`
  ‚Üí residual `B3comp.app‚ä§ (Œ±^p ((a‚äób)‚äóc)) = B3comp.app‚ä§ (a‚äó(b‚äóc))` closes by **`rfl`** (presheaf
  associator at ‚ä§ is objectwise the ModuleCat associator).
- **lean_verify confirmed:** `[propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` ‚Äî `sorryAx` traces
  SOLELY to B4. Auditor confirmed: no second sorry, no hidden circularity. Closes once B4 lands.

### B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (L2445) ‚Äî PARTIAL (NEW, typed sorry; THE deep crux)
- Morphism-level statement `(Œ∑‚ñ∑C ‚â´ Œ∑)‚â´Œì(Œ±) = Œ±^p ‚â´ (A‚óÅŒ∑ ‚â´ Œ∑)`. Auditor hover-confirmed well-formed,
  neither trivially true nor false.
- Blocker: `tensorObjAssoc` unfolds (probe `simp only [tensorObjAssoc, ‚Ä¶]` verified) to the 5-segment
  bridge composite `(tensorObjIso (A‚äóB) C).inv ‚â´ ((tensorObjIso A B).inv ‚ñ∑ C) ‚â´ (Œ±_ A B C).hom ‚â´
  (A ‚óÅ (tensorObjIso B C).hom) ‚â´ (tensorObjIso A (B‚äóC)).hom` taken to `.val`. Closing it = the
  `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` bridge-telescoping recipe lifted to the `.val` presheaf-morphism level
  (distribute `.val` over `‚â™‚â´`, rewrite each whiskered bridge vs `Œ∑` via
  `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` + `Localization.Monoidal.{Œº,associator}`, cancel adjacent
  `tensorObjIso` pairs by the full-defeq `simp only`). Multi-step; not pushed this pass.

### B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (L2640) ‚Äî PARTIAL (NEW, typed sorry; pentagon)
- Iso-level pentagon statement typechecks. SOUND ‚àÄL (both bracketings = SAME permutation, unlike the
  comm hexagon). Route: canonical pentagon induction on `m`, analogue of proven `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`,
  collapsing to `MonoidalCategory.pentagon`. Not attempted.

### B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (L2658) ‚Äî PARTIAL (typed sorry)
- Ingredients (1)=B5 and (3)=B6 now NAMED atoms in-file. One remaining unbuilt ingredient (2): the
  Œº-naturality slide of `sectionsMul` under whiskering (analogue of B2/B3 but with general `Œì(Œº)` in
  place of single `Œ∑`). Assembly mirrors `sectionsMul_mul_one`.

### Comm chain (L2695/2709/2730) ‚Äî UNTOUCHED, deferred
- `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`: all
  `[IsInvertible L]`-gated, **auditor-confirmed producer-only** (no Lean consumer anywhere). NOT a
  prover lane ‚Äî `GCommSemiring` unbuilt.

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched ‚Äî prover-touched file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter012` (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter012.md`): STRUCTURALLY SOUND, 6 known typed
  sorries, no laundering, no laundered-wrong statements, no excuse-comments. B2/B3 genuine (not
  defeq-laundering ‚Äî prove syntactically distinct exprs equal). B4 statement well-formed/non-trivial.
  B5 genuinely reduces to B4, no circularity. 2 major (see recommendations): stale comm comment
  L2745‚Äì2757; dangling `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer` docstring citation. 5 minor.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter012` (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter012.md`):
  **0 must-fix.** B2‚ÄìB7 match blueprint blocks on the nose; chapter prose detailed enough to guide
  B4/B6; honest sorry tracking (all 6 literal, un-`\leanok` at proof level; 3 comm gated `[IsInvertible
  L]`). 2 major (same comm comment Lean‚Üíbp; the coequalizer `\lean{}` coverage gap bp‚ÜíLean). 2 minor.

## Key findings / patterns
- **The morphism-level technique WORKED end-to-end** (the iter-011 diagnosis, validated): B2/B3 element
  forms ‚Äî written with the `‚äó‚Çú` driven through an enclosing `.hom` application rather than a bare
  annotated `‚äó‚Çú[forget‚ÇÇ-ring]` ‚Äî close by `rfl`. The B5 residual associator step is also `rfl` because
  the presheaf associator at ‚ä§ is definitionally the ModuleCat associator. The `forget‚ÇÇ` instance
  diamond is fully sidestepped on the whisker-unit legs.
- **B5-assembly recipe** (reusable for B7): `rw [‚Üê <whiskerRight-unit>, ‚Üê <whiskerLeft-unit>]` to expose
  the whiskered-unit composites, then `congrArg ((¬∑.app ‚ä§).hom <elt>) <morphism-factorization>`, then
  `rfl` on the objectwise-associator residual.
- The live SNAP question is now ONE telescoping crux (B4) + one pentagon induction (B6) + one Œº-slide
  lemma (B7's ingredient 2). All three have exact statements and documented routes.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` (iter 12, +7) correct: statement `\leanok` present on B4/B6 (= formalized), proof
  `\leanok` correctly absent on all 6 sorry-bodied decls (checker-confirmed). No `\mathlibok` warranted
  (all new decls project-proved or producer-only scaffolds). No `\lean{}` rename (names match blueprint).
  No stale `\notready`.

## Blueprint doctor
- All findings in DEFERRED chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange 2 phantom covers + 13 broken refs;
  Picard_GlueDescent 4; Picard_QuotScheme 13) ‚Äî out-of-cone extraction artifacts, byte-identical to
  parent, resolve at merge. Active `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` clean. Not edited.

## Coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 324 nodes (down from ~328), bulk inherited `Grassmannian.*` /
  `GradedModule.*` extraction artifacts (out-of-cone, merge-time). The session's new SNAP atoms
  (B2/B3/B4/B6) ARE blueprinted (checker-confirmed match). One coverage gap surfaced by the checker:
  the ~15 relative-tensor coequalizer bricks have no `\lean{}` block and Lean docstrings cite a
  non-existent `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer` ‚Äî flagged to planner (recommendations.md).
